name: Agent Browser
description: Browser automation with the agent-browser CLI: navigate pages, inspect accessibility snapshots, click/fill by refs, capture screenshots, and run web QA from the sandbox shell.

bootstrap:
if ! command -v chromium >/dev/null; then echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) trusted=yes] http://deb.debian.org/debian trixie main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/debian-trixie.list && printf "Package: *
Pin: release n=trixie
Pin-Priority: 100
" > /etc/apt/preferences.d/debian-trixie && apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends chromium && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*; fi
